Notes

Text-to-speech: On-device TTS over MLX (Apple silicon). Semantic tie is via generation types — main API surface is model-specific, hence modest confidence.

Maintainer of MLXAudio? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
